task: Redact protected-health-information (PHI) from clinical free-text. Returns the input with PHI fields masked: names, MRN, SSN, phone numbers, email addresses, dates, and US zip codes.

recipes.name: PHI redactor — pattern based

input.text: Patient: Jane Doe, MRN 1234567, DOB 01/15/1980, SSN 123-45-6789
Call Dr. Smith at 555-867-5309 or smith@hospital.org
Lab values normal. Vitals stable. Discharge home.

expected.redacted: Lab values normal. Vitals stable. Discharge home.

input.text: Patient: John Smith reports headache for 2 days
